name: @adhdev/daemon-standalone
description: ADHDev standalone daemon — embedded HTTP/WS server for local dashboard

scripts.preinstall:
node -e "const major=Number.parseInt(process.versions.node.split('.')[0],10); if (process.platform === 'win32' && major >= 24) { console.error('
✗ ADHDev standalone does not currently support Node.js 24+ on Windows.
  Install Node.js 22.x on Windows, then retry.
'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.prepublishOnly: cd ../.. && npm run build -w packages/session-host-daemon && npm run build -w packages/daemon-core && npm run build -w packages/web-standalone && cd packages/daemon-standalone && npm run bundle:web && npm run bundle:vendor && npm run build

author: vilmire
